title: Dzass IV

'''Dzass IV''' was an astronomical object that occupied the fourth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position<ref name="Wretched" /> within the [[Dzass system/Legends|Dzass system]]. It was a part of the [[Seswenna sector/Legends|Seswenna sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> of the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of<ref name="Trailing Sectors" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" />

Dzass IV was the site of the prestigious [[Lunis-Medix Medical Academy]]. At some point, the [[Anomid/Legends|Anomid]] businessman [[Yin Vocta]] graduated from the academy at the top of his class.<ref name="Wretched" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dzass IV was first mentioned in the [[1997]] sourcebook ''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'', authored by [[Paul Danner]] and published for [[West End Games]]'s ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Wretched" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Dzass [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Dzass IV, in grid square M-17.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
